name: Induction Cooktop
hint: Eliminates gas combustion in the kitchen.

name: Professional Air Sealing
hint: Stops heated/cooled air from leaking out.

name: Optimize Fridge Temp
hint: Slightly warmer = less energy, still safe.

name: DIY Door Draft Stopper
hint: Cheap fix for one of the most common leaks.

name: Attic Insulation
hint: Roof is the biggest heat-loss point in most homes.

name: Smart Thermostat
hint: Adjusts automatically when you're away or asleep.

name: Curtain Management
hint: Thermal curtains reduce heat transfer through glass.

name: Clear Furniture from Vents
hint: Blocked vents force the system to work harder.

name: Heat Pump Water Heater
hint: 60% less electricity than a standard water heater.

name: Lower Water Temp to 120F
hint: Most heaters ship at 140°F — 120°F is safer and cheaper.

name: Low-Flow Showerheads
hint: Less hot water used = less energy to heat it.

name: 5-Minute Shower Goal
hint: Hot water is the real cost of long showers.

name: Air Drying Rack
hint: Dryers are among the highest-energy appliances.

name: Cold Water Wash
hint: 90% of washing machine energy goes to heating water.

name: Full Load Only
hint: Same energy use whether half-full or full.

name: Clean Lint Filter
hint: A clogged filter makes the dryer run longer.
